name: 14q22_RTN1_SD
description: 14q22.3-q23.1 region containing RTN1, MNAT1, NID2, and OTX2 (covered separately). Small intra-chromosomal SDs (5-20 kb at 93-97% identity) flank RTN1 and the OTX2 proximal flank, contributing to rare CNVs distinct from the OTX2 microdeletion.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-20 kb SD pairs at 93-97% identity flanking RTN1; small OTX2-region paralog footprints distal.
